india_trends.title: Pulse of the Street: Indian equities fall as global headwinds and domestic woes bite
india_trends.summary: Benchmark indices posted their worst weekly slide in two months as the energy shock and record-low rupee rattled investor sentiments.

india_trends.title: SEBI expands use of borrowings for highly leveraged InvITs
india_trends.summary: The move allows funds to be used for capital expenditure, capacity expansion, major maintenance, and refinancing of principal debt under specified conditions

india_trends.title: India's exports hit record USD 863 bn despite global turmoil; on track for USD 2 trillion target by 2030: Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: India's exports touched a record USD 863 billion in FY26 despite global geopolitical tensions and disruptions in international trade, Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal said on Friday, asserting that the country remains on track to achieve its USD 2 trillion exports target by 2030.

india_trends.title: Government gives final nod to Emirates NBD's $3 billion majority stake in RBL Bank
india_trends.summary: Dubai's Emirates NBD has secured all necessary approvals for its significant investment in RBL Bank. This landmark deal, valued at approximately $3 billion, will see Emirates NBD acquire a majority controlling stake. The transaction is set to be completed soon. RBL Bank will operate as a foreign ban

india_trends.title: India's BRICS trade surges to $416 billion, but widening deficit raises policy imperative ahead of 2026 Summit
india_trends.summary: India's trade with BRICS nations shows strong growth. However, a widening trade deficit is a major concern. Imports from BRICS are rising faster than exports. Russia is a key import source. India aims to balance import dependencies and boost outbound shipments. The expanded BRICS bloc holds signific

india_trends.title: Sebi, CBDT ease PAN rules for foreign investors after onboarding concerns
india_trends.summary: Sebi and CBDT relaxed PAN compliance requirements for foreign portfolio investors after concerns over complex onboarding rules. india_trends.title: Wall Street slips as yields jump on inflation fears
india_trends.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.27%, the S&amp;P 500 fell 0.75%, the Nasdaq Composite dropped 1.30%

india_trends.title: Centre to procure onions at Rs 12.35 per kg rate from farmers, says Chouhan
india_trends.summary: Onion farmers will receive Rs 12.35 per kg for their produce. Union Agriculture Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan announced this procurement price. The government will buy all available stock. This move aims to support growers facing falling prices. Onion exports have been impacted by the West Asian cr

india_trends.title: 3 years of derivatives relaunch: How Sensex turned Rs 2 crore premium into Rs 33,000 crore options business
india_trends.summary: BSE has rapidly expanded its derivatives business through Sensex weekly options, sharply increasing turnover, market share and profitability. Lower transaction costs, rising retail participation and algorithmic trading boosted volumes, while derivatives growth significantly strengthened BSE’s revenu

india_trends.title: Punjab schools shine: 416 govt schools achieve 100% pass rate in Class 12
india_trends.summary: Punjab government schools have achieved a remarkable 100% pass rate in the PSEB Class 12 examinations. Girls have once again demonstrated academic superiority, excelling in both merit and overall pass percentages. This success reflects significant improvements in government educational institutions.

india_trends.title: Sebi expands permitted use of borrowings for highly leveraged InvITs
india_trends.summary: The changes, which have come into force with immediate effect, are aimed at providing greater flexibility to InvITs in managing funding requirements.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: S&P, Nasdaq plunge 1% at open as yields jump on inflation worries
india_trends.summary: Wall ​Street ​indexes opened sharply lower ​on Friday, as inflation fears triggered ‌by ⁠the ⁠Middle East conflict ​drove up Treasury yields ​and threatened to halt an AI-fueled ​rally.

india_trends.title: ITC Hotels Q4 PAT at Rs 317 crore, chain posts revenue of Rs 1,254 crore
india_trends.summary: ITC Hotels posted strong FY26 growth with higher revenue, profit and record hotel signings. The company acquired a luxury resort in Kumarakom, expanded its managed pipeline, maintained industry-leading RevPAR and outlined plans to scale operations to 250 hotels by 2031.

india_trends.title: India's trade with West Asia contracts for second straight month in April amid shipping disruptions
india_trends.summary: April marked a downturn in India’s trade relationship with West Asia, as both exports and imports experienced a staggering reduction of more than 28%.
